title: Software Engineer (InterimLead)
description:
• ● Led the design and delivery of a revenue-generating Ads platform, enabling users to run paid campaigns using an in-app virtual currency; owned the feature end-to-end from technical design to production rollout. 
• ● Designed and implemented backend services in Node.js and TypeScript, integrating GraphQL APIs and event-driven workflows (Pub/Sub) to support campaign lifecycle, billing, and analytics. 
• ● Built and optimized frontend flows using React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS, focusing on performance, usability, and seamless integration with backend systems. 
• ● Optimized customer and contact management workflows, reducing operational costs and improving efficiency through targeted backend and integration improvements. 
• ● Acted as interim technical lead, guiding architectural decisions, mentoring engineers, and coordinating delivery across frontend, backend, and product stakeholders.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
• ● Built and integrated WebRTC-based audio services, handling real-time media streaming and processing for internal AI and communication workflows with React and TypeScript. 
• ● Developed graph-heavy data visualizations and analytics features using Vue.js and Chart.js for an AI-driven sports summarization platform.

title: Software Developer
description: • ● Automated internal business processes, including a lightweight CRM (PHP) and a kiosk application (React Native-based) delivered under tight deadlines.

title: Software Developer
description: • ● Modernized legacy environments by introducing proper dev/test/uat/prod separation and automating internal taxation workflows. Mostly used .Net technologies and PHP with JS.

title: Software Developer
description: • ● Built internal tools and managed localized web content across multiple regions.

description: across multiple open-source projects, primarily in frontend and platform tooling.
